name: View System Logs
description: View Yuihime's system logs, audit trails, and LLM input/output details to diagnose system states, execution errors, or API issues.

logType.description: Type of logs to retrieve: 'audit' (for tool execution & structure compliance audit logs) or 'llm' (for direct direct cognitive LLM language prompts & replies).

limit.description: Number of recent log lines to retrieve (default is 10).

filter.description: Optional search keyword or tool name to filter logs (e.g., 'tensorart', 'error').
